protocol_rows.detail: Treat reduce as frozen handoff package; no broad reduce tuning may continue during add frontier startup.
If any reduce work reappears, it must stay strictly inside the four local rebound-residue seeds.
The next frontier should be intraday add, but only as a separate frontier rather than an extension of reduce.
Board lockout, local-only rebound guard, and board revival unlock remain upstream vetoes when add research later begins.
Intraday add must not inherit execution-facing authority from reduce; it starts as a new supervision frontier.

interpretation: V1.34CP does not start intraday add research yet; it formalizes how the program should cross the frontier without reopening reduce.
The point is to make the handoff explicit so that later intraday add work begins on clean scope rather than as a leak from reduce.
